title: SPOILERS Five Crosses Six spears
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Mar 14, 2021 2:49 am This is something that really puzzled me regarding the impact mechanics/nature of the Adams after watching 3.0 + 1.0 (twice). When the Wunder finally approaches the epicenter of Second Impact in Calvary base (Antarctica), we see there are actually FIVE crosses standing, and a circular rainbow around each. Four of them are standing upright, just as it is seen in flashbacks of 2I in previous movies, but the fifth one is heaviliy slanted, diagonally. Initially, they are seen as CGI silhouetted on the Wunder screen, before the image switches to “actual video feed”. In the initial “schematic” display, the fifth, diagonal cross ends in a weird glyph that resembles a mix of a “4” and an “S”, I think something similar appears near the end of the NGE opening...? I think it’s one of the alchemy symbols representing one of the planets but I could be wrong. Also, Gendo and the other characters speak about there being “6 spears in total”, with the last remaining two being delivered to the Golgotha Object near the end during the confrontation between Gendo/Eva-13 and Shinji/Unit-01. If we assume each Adams had one spear (this is consistent with that one shot from “Until you come to me”, as well as the 2I flashback in 2.0), and Lilith has another, where does the 6th spear come from? Perhaps there were FIVE Adams to begin with? This would explain the five crosses at the south pole, but there’s a problem: There are FOUR Wunder-type arks, each one paired with its own Adams’ Vessel (Mark 09, 10, 11 and 12), so this strongly suggests that the Adams themselves must be four too... Food for thought.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Mar 14, 2021 3:47 am There's a secret third spear, called Gaius I believe. So four longinus, one Cassius, one Gaius.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Sun Mar 14, 2021 9:09 am This is pure speculation, but maybe there's a 5th central Adam, represented by the giant cross. This 5th Adam may be related to unit-13 or to the key.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 14, 2021 11:27 am Raikyu wrote: This is pure speculation, but maybe there's a 5th central Adam, represented by the giant cross. This 5th Adam may be related to unit-13 or to the key.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Pluto » Sun Mar 14, 2021 5:08 pm I've noticed this as well but I can only speculate at this moment. If anyone is in possession of the theatrical pamphlet the image in question is on page 12.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Sun Mar 14, 2021 8:53 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: There's a secret third spear, called Gaius I believe. So four longinus, one Cassius, one Gaius.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Pluto » Mon Mar 15, 2021 5:41 pm Here is the image in question from the pamphlet

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Mon Mar 15, 2021 6:25 pm DantesInferno wrote: This “central adam” (and not just a fifth one, "on the same footing" as the others) could make sense, in that it does not contradict the pairing of the four Adams with their vessels and their arks.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Tue Mar 16, 2021 12:13 am Raikyu wrote: DantesInferno#915559 wrote: This “central adam” (and not just a fifth one, "on the same footing" as the others) could make sense, in that it does not contradict the pairing of the four Adams with their vessels and their arks.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by kuro hazama » Tue Mar 16, 2021 9:20 am Is It possible that each of the ships are the spears, and so they need the adams´s surrogates to take them as their masters? by that count we have 4 ships and the wunder IIRC, which may account for the additional spear/element/whatever at second impact that left a cross.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Tue Mar 16, 2021 1:47 pm DantesInferno wrote: Raikyu#915811 wrote: Also, we still don't know which one caused the red line in the moon, assuming that the storyboards of 2.0 are still true. https://external-preview.redd.it/HjE8vY_g8qdNRAY1ugnnub2Sv6LW-h7KzDYTRWFHteM.jpg?auto=webp&s=b674229e5a8df64b84fbe3e7a13b1c80f020d12a

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Tue Mar 16, 2021 9:22 pm Raikyu wrote: DantesInferno#915851 wrote: I thought it was pretty much certain that it was Mark 06?

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Mar 17, 2021 1:24 am DantesInferno wrote: It doesn’t make any sense that Seele went all the way to the moon to build the 12th angel, and call it “the true Evangelion”.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Mar 17, 2021 1:33 am Pffffft More like a they played bloodborne and they copied the moon presence

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Raikyu » Wed Mar 17, 2021 9:25 am SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Mar 17, 2021 2:43 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: More like a they played bloodborne and they copied the moon presence

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Mar 17, 2021 7:34 pm Blockio wrote: ChaddyManPrime#916063 wrote: More like a they played bloodborne and they copied the moon presence

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Mar 19, 2021 6:45 pm Did anyone else notice black moon in this shot? Gendo and Fuyutski literally drive black moon to the south pole.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Fri Mar 19, 2021 10:45 pm Pluto wrote: Did anyone else notice black moon in this shot? Gendo and Fuyutski literally drive black moon to the south pole.

[]: Re: [SPOILERS] Five Crosses, Six spears?             Quote Post by Pluto » Fri Apr 16, 2021 8:59 pm Why five crosses? Let's work backwards. What was Gendo trying to do? Initiate the fourth impact at the epicenter of the second impact. What did he need to initiate the fourth impact? 4 battleships + 1 Ascended Eva + 4 spears [Note: the four battleships grow wings of light when the fourth impact is occurs] How was he attempting to do this? Recreate the conditions of the second impact + ascended eva. What do we see at the epicenter of the second impact? 4 upright crosses + 1 slanted cross. What do we see in the 2.0 second impact flashback scene? 4 crosses 1 black sphere leaving the earth 4 Adams 4 spears 4 sets of wings of light Some lingering thoughts SPOILER: Show
